arts.ttl: Arsenal star picks up worrying injury ahead of crucial Andrea Berta summer decision
arts.sum: He made a solid impression in his first season, but since then a string of loans has left him away from the Emirates Stadium since 2022 and he has now picked up some worrying injuries. Just before his move to Italy Tavares revealed to Portuguese newspaper Record: "Yes, obviously, I have in mind to return to Arsenal and have a good pre-season.

arts.ttl: Wednesday’s briefing: Glory for Gunners but Kane and Lionesses both beaten
arts.sum: Aston Villa will look to emulate Arsenal’s Champions League heroics after Declan Rice’s free-kick double stunned Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice clarifies what Nicolas Jover told Arsenal star before Real Madrid strike
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Declan Rice scored the first two direct free-kick goals of his career as Mikel Arteta's side stunned Real Madrid in their Champions League quarter-final

arts.ttl: Arsenal have already found their perfect Thomas Partey replacement as £52m transfer mission clear
arts.sum: With Thomas Partey and Jorginho looking increasingly likely they won't be returning to the Emirates Stadium next season, Mikel Arteta's has some work to do in rebuilding a new midfield for the 2025/26 campaign. But instead of making a big money move to the Premier League, the midfielder chose to stay at Sociedad but now football.london understands that the Gunners have been long admirers of Zubimendi, dating back even before then.

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Arsenal 3-0 Real Madrid; 2025 UEFA Champions League Quarter Final
arts.sum: Luka Modric—5: Overrun by the Arsenal midfield and failed to get Madrid playing, with a massive drop off in the second half. Jude Bellingham—6: Anything positive that Madrid created in the final third came from Jude Bellingham’s feet: the pass to Mbappe for the 1:1 in the first half and another one-touch pass in the second half to again free the Frenchman.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Arsenal 3 - 0 Real Madrid, 1st Leg, Post-game, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Lucas Navarrete, Kiyan Sobhani, Matt Wiltse, and Leah Revelle discuss everything that went wrong in Real Madrid ’s humiliation at the hands of Arsenal at the Etihad. Lucas Navarrete, Kiyan Sobhani, Matt Wiltse, and Leah Revelle discuss everything that went wrong in Real Madrid’s humiliation at the hands of Arsenal at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal injury update on Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice after Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has confirmed that Declan Rice and Bukayo Saka both suffered problems in Tuesday night's 3-0 win over Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-final first-leg. Saka, who started for the first time since returning from his hamstring injury, came off in the 74th minute before Rice followed him six minutes later.

arts.ttl: Man Utd, Liverpool and Arsenal 'in transfer battle as historic offer lined up'
arts.sum: Boubacar Kamara has become one of Aston Villa's most important players but before Champions League clash with PSG, French media say the midfielder is being watched by a host of top teams

arts.ttl: Declan Rice reveals Arsenal free-kick change after Real Madrid double
arts.sum: Mikel Merino added a third for Arsenal to put them in cruise control for the second leg but the man of the moment was Rice with his spectacular free-kick double. Arsenal star Declan Rice has expressed his delight at scoring two superb free-kicks to hand the Gunners a 3-0 win over Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-final first-leg.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe shares defiant seven-word message on Instagram after Real Madrid's 3-0 defeat at Arsenal leaves their Champions League hopes hanging by a thread
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe believes Real Madrid can mastermind what would be a remarkable comeback and overturn their 3-0 Champions League deficit to Arsenal.
